description: A Volkswagen hatchback viewed from the side (image appears clear). The vehicle shows used wear with tinted flat windows. It features off oval headlights and angular taillights, complemented by a horizontal grille with rounded edges. The clean flat roof sits above new medium regular tires with intact bumpers. Side mirrors are intact. License plate is not visible. Spoiler is not present. Roof rack is present. Exhaust system features hidden pipes.
